assertions.assertion: The code calls .AddSaml() on the IdentityServer builder chain
assertions.rationale: The code calls .AddSamlPlugin() instead of the correct .AddSaml() method.

assertions.assertion: No separate NuGet package is added — SAML is built into Duende.IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: The response adds a separate NuGet package 'Duende.IdentityServer.Saml2p', which is incorrect — SAML is built into the main package.

assertions.assertion: A SamlServiceProvider is created with EntityId set to 'https://crm.contoso.com'
assertions.rationale: Uses 'ServiceProvider' class instead of 'SamlServiceProvider'. The EntityId is set but on the wrong type.
Uses 'AssertionConsumerServices' with a different structure instead of 'AssertionConsumerServiceUrls'.

assertions.assertion: The code mentions or uses AddInMemorySamlServiceProviders to register the SP
